text:
### Instruction:
Read the software project description and produce structured GitHub issues that represent the core engineering tasks needed to build the system, including architecture, backend, frontend, APIs, infrastructure, testing, and deployment.

### Input:
The employee engagement tool connects with a performance review system.

### Response:
[{"title": "Employee Engagement API Integration", "body": "### Objective
Integrate the employee engagement tool with a performance review system to enable seamless data exchange and improve employee insights.

### Technical Description
The integration will require the development of a RESTful API to facilitate data exchange between the two systems. The API will need to handle authentication, authorization, and data validation to ensure secure and accurate data transfer.

### Tasks
- [ ] Design and implement the RESTful API using a suitable programming language and framework.
- [ ] Implement API endpoint for retrieving employee data from the performance review system.
- [ ] Implement API endpoint for sending employee data to the performance review system.
- [ ] Implement API endpoint for handling errors and exceptions.
- [ ] Test and deploy the API in a production environment.

Labels: [backend, api]", "labels": ["technical-debt"]}]

### Instruction:
Read the software project description and produce structured GitHub issues that represent the core engineering tasks needed to build the system, including architecture, backend, frontend, APIs, infrastructure, testing, and deployment.

### Input:
The e-signature platform features a document storage system.

### Response:
[{"title": "Document Storage System", "body": "### Objective
Implement a document storage system for the e-signature platform.

### Technical Description
Design and implement a scalable and secure document storage system that integrates with the existing platform architecture.

### Tasks
- [ ] Design the document storage system architecture.
- [ ] Implement the document storage system using a suitable technology stack (e.g. database, file system, etc.).
- [ ] Integrate the document storage system with the existing platform APIs.
- [ ] Implement data encryption and access controls for the stored documents.
- [ ] Conduct thorough testing to ensure the document storage system is stable and secure.

labels: [backend, api]", "labels": ["technical-debt"]}]

### Instruction:
Read the software project description and produce structured GitHub issues that represent the core engineering tasks needed to build the system, including architecture, backend, frontend, APIs, infrastructure, testing, and deployment.

### Input:
The help desk software integrates with a remote support system.

### Response:
[{"title": "Integração com Sistema de Suporte Remoto", "body": "### Objetivo
Integrar o software de help desk com um sistema de suporte remoto para fornecer uma experiência de usuário mais coerente.

### Descrição Técnica
A integração deve ser feita utilizando APIs RESTful e protocolos de comunicação seguros. O software de help desk deve ser capaz de enviar e receber informações de status, histórico de conversas e outros dados relevantes ao sistema de suporte remoto.

### Tasks
- [ ] Conectar o software de help desk ao sistema de suporte remoto utilizando API RESTful.
- [ ] Implementar protocolos de comunicação seguros para proteger dados sensíveis.
- [ ] Desenvolver lógica de negócios para sincronizar informações entre os dois sistemas.
- [ ] Testar a integração para garantir que os dados sejam transferidos corretamente.

Labels: [backend, api]", "labels": ["technical-debt"]}, {"title": "Autenticação e Autorização", "body": "### Objetivo
Garantir a segurança da integração ao sistema de suporte remoto.

### Descrição Técnica
A autenticação e autorização devem ser implementadas para garantir que apenas usuários autorizados possam acessar e manipular os dados.

### Tasks
- [ ] Implementar autenticação e autorização utilizando tokens de acesso.
- [ ] Desenvolver lógica de negócios para verificar a autenticidade dos usuários.
- [ ] Testar a autenticação e autorização para garantir que apenas usuários autorizados possam acessar os dados.

Labels: [backend, security]", "labels": ["technical-debt"]}]

### Instruction:
Read the software project description and produce structured GitHub issues that represent the core engineering tasks needed to build the system, including architecture, backend, frontend, APIs, infrastructure, testing, and deployment.

### Input:
The e-commerce website connects to a customer segmentation system.

### Response:
[{"title": "Integração com Sistema de Segmentação de Clientes", "body": "### Objetivo
Integrar a loja e-commerce com o sistema de segmentação de clientes para obter insights sobre os clientes e melhorar a experiência do usuário.

### Descrição Técnica
O sistema de segmentação de clientes fornece dados sobre as características dos clientes, como compras recentes, compras passadas e tendências de compras. A integração deve ser feita por meio de APIs para obter e enviar dados.

### Tasks
- [ ] Desenvolver API para obter dados do sistema de segmentação de clientes.
- [ ] Implementar chamadas API na loja e-commerce para obter dados do sistema de segmentação de clientes.
- [ ] Testar a integração para garantir que os dados sejam enviados e recebidos corretamente.
- [ ] Documentar a integração para que outros desenvolvedores possam entender como usá-la.
", "labels": ["backend", "api"]}, {"title": "Implementação de Requisitos para Integração", "body": "### Objetivo
Implementar os requisitos técnicos necessários para a integração da loja e-commerce com o sistema de segmentação de clientes.

### Descrição Técnica
A implementação deve incluir a configuração de APIs, autenticação e autorização, tratamento de erros e exceções, e validação de dados.

### Tasks
- [ ] Configurar APIs para obter e enviar dados.
- [ ] Implementar autenticação e autorização para proteger a integração.
- [ ] Implementar tratamento de erros e exceções para garantir que a integração seja robusta.
- [ ] Validar dados recebidos e enviados para garantir que sejam corretos.
", "labels": ["backend", "api"]}]

### Instruction:
Read the software project description and produce structured GitHub issues that represent the core engineering tasks needed to build the system, including architecture, backend, frontend, APIs, infrastructure, testing, and deployment.

### Input:
The marketing platform features a social media management system.

### Response:
[{"title": "Social Media Management System Architecture", "body": "### Objective
Define the architecture for the social media management system.

### Technical Description
The system will be built using a microservices architecture, with the following components:
* Social Media API: responsible for interacting with social media platforms.
* Post Processor: responsible for processing and formatting posts.
* Post Scheduler: responsible for scheduling posts.
* Analytics Dashboard: responsible for displaying analytics.

### Tasks
- [ ] Design the architecture and create a high-level diagram.
- [ ] Implement the Social Media API using a RESTful API framework.
- [ ] Implement the Post Processor and Post Scheduler using a message broker (e.g. RabbitMQ).
- [ ] Implement the Analytics Dashboard using a web framework (e.g. React).
- [ ] Integrate the components using a service mesh (e.g. Istio).
", "labels": ["architecture", "backend", "api"]}, {"title": "Social Media API Implementation", "body": "### Objective
Implement the Social Media API using a RESTful API framework.

### Technical Description
The API will be responsible for interacting with social media platforms (e.g. Twitter, Facebook, Instagram).

### Tasks
- [ ] Choose a RESTful API framework (e.g. Spring Boot, Flask).
- [ ] Implement the API endpoints for posting, commenting, and liking.
- [ ] Integrate with social media platforms using their APIs.
- [ ] Implement API key management and authentication.
", "labels": ["backend", "api"]}, {"title": "Post Processor and Scheduler Implementation", "body": "### Objective
Implement the Post Processor and Scheduler using a message broker.

### Technical Description
The Post Processor will be responsible for processing and formatting posts.
The Scheduler will be responsible for scheduling posts.

### Tasks
- [ ] Choose a message broker (e.g. RabbitMQ, Apache Kafka).
- [ ] Implement the Post Processor and Scheduler using the message broker.
- [ ] Implement a job scheduling system (e.g. Quartz).
- [ ] Integrate with the Social Media API.
", "labels": ["backend", "message-broker"]}, {"title": "Analytics Dashboard Implementation", "body": "### Objective
Implement the Analytics Dashboard using a web framework.

### Technical Description
The Analytics Dashboard will be responsible for displaying analytics.

### Tasks
- [ ] Choose a web framework (e.g. React, Angular).
- [ ] Implement the dashboard components (e.g. charts, tables).
- [ ] Integrate with the Social Media API.
- [ ] Implement data visualization and filtering.
", "labels": ["frontend", "analytics"]}]

### Instruction:
Read the software project description and produce structured GitHub issues that represent the core engineering tasks needed to build the system, including architecture, backend, frontend, APIs, infrastructure, testing, and deployment.

### Input:
The analytics platform integrates with a data import/export tool.

### Response:
[{"title": "Analytics Platform Integration", "body": "### Objective
Integrate the analytics platform with a data import/export tool.

### Technical Description
The integration requires a RESTful API to be created to facilitate data exchange between the analytics platform and the data import/export tool. The API should support CRUD (Create, Read, Update, Delete) operations.

### Tasks
- [ ] Design the API architecture and implement the necessary endpoints.
- [ ] Develop the API using a suitable programming language and framework.
- [ ] Implement data validation and error handling mechanisms.
- [ ] Integrate the API with the analytics platform and the data import/export tool.
- [ ] Test the API using a testing framework and provide documentation.
", "labels": ["backend", "api"]}]

### Instruction:
Read the software project description and produce structured GitHub issues that represent the core engineering tasks needed to build the system, including architecture, backend, frontend, APIs, infrastructure, testing, and deployment.

### Input:
The video sharing platform features a video compression system.

### Response:
[{"title": "Video Compression System", "body": "### Objective
Implement a video compression system to reduce video file sizes without compromising video quality.

### Description
The video compression system should be able to compress videos in various formats (e.g. MP4, AVI, MOV) and resolutions (e.g. 1080p, 4K). The system should also be able to handle videos with varying lengths and complexities.

### Tasks
- [ ] Research and implement a suitable video compression algorithm (e.g. H.264, VP9, AV1).
- [ ] Integrate the compression algorithm with the video sharing platform's API.
- [ ] Test the video compression system with various video formats and resolutions.
- [ ] Optimize the video compression system for performance and scalability.
- [ ] Document the video compression system's architecture and implementation.
", "labels": ["backend", "api", "compression"]}]

### Instruction:
Read the software project description and produce structured GitHub issues that represent the core engineering tasks needed to build the system, including architecture, backend, frontend, APIs, infrastructure, testing, and deployment.

### Input:
The content management system integrates with a web analytics tool.

### Response:
[{"title": "Integrating CMS with Web Analytics Tool", "body": "### Objective
Integrate the Content Management System (CMS) with a web analytics tool to track website traffic and user behavior.

### Technical Description
The integration will involve setting up APIs to send and receive data between the CMS and the web analytics tool. This will require developing a backend API to handle the data exchange and implementing necessary security measures.

### Tasks
- [ ] Research web analytics tools and APIs
- [ ] Design and develop backend API for data exchange
- [ ] Implement security measures for data transmission and storage
- [ ] Test and validate API functionality", "labels": ["backend", "api"]}]

### Instruction:

### Input:
The online advertising platform connects with a conversion tracking system.

### Response:
[{"title": "API Integration with Conversion Tracking System", "body": "### Objective
Integrate the online advertising platform with the conversion tracking system to enable accurate tracking of ad conversions.

### Technical Description
The integration will involve developing an API endpoint to receive conversion data from the tracking system and processing the data to update the advertising platform's database.

### Tasks
- [ ] Design and implement the API endpoint to receive conversion data.
- [ ] Develop data processing logic to update the advertising platform's database.
- [ ] Test the API endpoint and data processing logic.
- [ ] Deploy the integration to production.

Labels: [backend, api, integration]", "labels": ["technical-debt"]}]

### Instruction:
Read the software project description and produce structured GitHub issues that represent the core engineering tasks needed to build the system, including architecture, backend, frontend, APIs, infrastructure, testing, and deployment.

### Input:
The task management tool features a priority setting system.

### Response:
[{"title": "Prioridade em Task Management Tool", "body": "### Objetivo
Implementar sistema de priorização para task management tool.

### Descrição Técnica
O sistema de priorização deve permitir que os usuários definam prioridades para as tarefas, possibilitando a gerenciamento mais eficaz de tarefas.

### Tasks
- [ ] Criar tabela para armazenar prioridades em banco de dados.
- [ ] Implementar logica para ordenar tarefas pela prioridade.
- [ ] Criar API para acessar e alterar prioridades.
- [ ] Implementar validação de prioridade (1-5).
- [ ] Testar API de prioridade.
- [ ] Integar prioridade com existente sistema de task management.

Labels: [backend, api, database]", "labels": ["technical-debt"]}]

### Instruction:
Read the software project description and produce structured GitHub issues that represent the core engineering tasks needed to build the system, including architecture, backend, frontend, APIs, infrastructure, testing, and deployment.

### Input:
The document collaboration software integrates with a version control system.

### Response:
[{"title": "Integração com sistema de controle de versão", "body": "### Objetivo
Integrar o software de colaboração de documentos com um sistema de controle de versão para permitir a sincronização de arquivos entre os usuários.

### Descrição Técnica
A integração será realizada mediante a API do sistema de controle de versão. Nossa aplicação deve ser capaz de receber as alterações de arquivos e sincronizar essas alterações com o sistema de controle de versão.

### Tasks
- [ ] Conectar à API do sistema de controle de versão
- [ ] Implementar a sincronização de arquivos entre a aplicação e o sistema de controle de versão
- [ ] Testar a integração com diferentes tipos de arquivos e cenários", "labels": ["integration", "api", "backend"]}]

### Instruction:
Read the software project description and produce structured GitHub issues that represent the core engineering tasks needed to build the system, including architecture, backend, frontend, APIs, infrastructure, testing, and deployment.

### Input:
The cloud storage service connects to a file encryption system.

### Response:
[{"title": "Cloud Storage Service Integration", "body": "### Objective
Integrate the cloud storage service with the file encryption system.

### Technical Description
The cloud storage service will connect to the file encryption system to encrypt and decrypt files. The integration will involve creating API endpoints to interact with the file encryption system.

### Tasks
- [ ] Design and implement API endpoints for encryption and decryption.
- [ ] Test API endpoints with various file types and encryption settings.", "labels": ["backend", "api"]}, {"title": "Cloud Storage Service Authentication", "body": "### Objective
Implement authentication for the cloud storage service.

### Technical Description
The cloud storage service will require authentication to ensure secure access to the file encryption system. This will involve implementing authentication mechanisms such as OAuth or JWT.

### Tasks
- [ ] Research and implement authentication mechanism (OAuth or JWT).
- [ ] Test authentication mechanism with various user credentials.", "labels": ["backend", "security"]}, {"title": "Cloud Storage Service File Handling", "body": "### Objective
Implement file handling for the cloud storage service.

### Technical Description
The cloud storage service will require the ability to upload, download, and manage files. This will involve implementing file upload/download logic and integrating with the file encryption system.

### Tasks
- [ ] Design and implement file upload/download logic.
- [ ] Test file upload/download logic with various file types.", "labels": ["backend", "file-handling"]}, {"title": "Cloud Storage Service Error Handling", "body": "### Objective
Implement error handling for the cloud storage service.

### Technical Description
The cloud storage service will require robust error handling to ensure that errors are properly handled and reported. This will involve implementing try-catch blocks and error logging mechanisms.

### Tasks
- [ ] Design and implement error handling mechanisms.
- [ ] Test error handling mechanisms with various error scenarios.", "labels": ["backend", "error-handling"]}]

### Instruction:

### Input:
The note-taking application features a speech-to-text conversion tool.

### Response:
[{"title": "Speech-to-Text Conversion", "body": "### Objective
Implement a speech-to-text conversion tool for the note-taking application.

### Technical Description
The tool should be able to recognize and transcribe spoken words accurately. This feature will enhance the user experience by allowing users to take notes hands-free.

### Tasks
- [ ] Research and evaluate existing speech-to-text APIs (e.g. Google Cloud Speech-to-Text, Amazon Transcribe).
- [ ] Integrate the chosen API into the note-taking application.
- [ ] Test and refine the speech-to-text conversion tool to achieve high accuracy.
- [ ] Implement a user interface for the speech-to-text conversion tool (e.g. a microphone icon or a voice command).
- [ ] Integrate the speech-to-text conversion tool with the existing note-taking functionality.
", "labels": ["backend", "api"]}]

### Instruction:
Read the software project description and produce structured GitHub issues that represent the core engineering tasks needed to build the system, including architecture, backend, frontend, APIs, infrastructure, testing, and deployment.

### Input:
The learning platform integrates with a plagiarism detection system.

### Response:
[{"title": "Integração com Plagiarism Detection System", "body": "### Objetivo
Integrar o aprendizado de plataforma com sistema de detecção de plágio para fornecer feedback aos usuários sobre a originalidade do conteúdo.

### Descrição Técnica
O sistema de detecção de plágio fornecerá um ID para cada conteúdo submetido, permitindo a plataforma verificar a originalidade do conteúdo e fornecer feedback ao usuário.

### Tasks
- [ ] Conectar API da plataforma com API do sistema de detecção de plágio.
- [ ] Implementar lógica para verificar a originalidade do conteúdo e fornecer feedback ao usuário.
- [ ] Testar integração com diferentes tipos de conteúdo (textos, imagens, etc.)
- [ ] Documentar processo de integração e testes realizados.
", "labels": ["backend", "api"]}]

### Instruction:
Read the software project description and produce structured GitHub issues that represent the core engineering tasks needed to build the system, including architecture, backend, frontend, APIs, infrastructure, testing, and deployment.

### Input:
The user experience design tool features a prototype creation system.

### Response:
[{"title": "Prototype Creation System", "body": "### Overview
The Prototype Creation System is a feature of the user experience design tool that allows users to create and manage prototypes.

### Technical Description
The system will be built using a modern web framework (e.g. React, Angular, Vue) and will integrate with the existing design tool architecture. It will include features such as:

* Prototype creation and editing
* Component library management
* Collaborative editing and version control

### Tasks
- [ ] Design and implement the prototype creation system
- [ ] Integrate with the existing design tool architecture
- [ ] Develop component library management features
- [ ] Implement collaborative editing and version control
", "labels": ["frontend", "backend", "architecture"]}, {"title": "API Integration", "body": "### Overview
The Prototype Creation System will require integration with the existing API to retrieve and store prototype data.

### Technical Description
The API integration will involve developing a RESTful API using a modern web framework (e.g. Node.js, Python) that can handle requests and responses from the prototype creation system. The API will provide endpoints for:

* Creating and retrieving prototypes
* Managing prototype components
* Handling collaborative editing and version control

### Tasks
- [ ] Design and implement the API endpoints
- [ ] Integrate the API with the prototype creation system
- [ ] Develop API documentation
", "labels": ["backend", "api"]}, {"title": "Database Schema", "body": "### Overview
The Prototype Creation System will require a database schema to store prototype data.

### Technical Description
The database schema will involve designing and implementing a database model that can store and retrieve prototype data. The schema will include tables for:

* Prototypes
* Components
* Version control

### Tasks
- [ ] Design and implement the database schema
- [ ] Migrate existing data to the new schema
- [ ] Develop database documentation
", "labels": ["database", "architecture"]}, {"title": "CI/CD Pipeline", "body": "### Overview
The Prototype Creation System will require a CI/CD pipeline to automate testing and deployment.

### Technical Description
The CI/CD pipeline will involve setting up a pipeline that automates testing, building, and deployment of the prototype creation system. The pipeline will include stages for:

* Unit testing
* Integration testing
* Deployment to production

### Tasks
- [ ] Set up the CI/CD pipeline
- [ ] Automate testing and deployment
- [ ] Monitor and log pipeline execution
", "labels": ["ci/cd", "testing"]}]

### Input:
The file recovery software connects with a data recovery system.

### Response:
[{"title": "Data Recovery System Integration", "body": "### Objective
Integrate the file recovery software with a data recovery system.

### Technical Description
The file recovery software will establish a connection with the data recovery system to retrieve files.

### Tasks
- [ ] Develop API integration with data recovery system
- [ ] Implement data transfer protocol
- [ ] Test API connection and data transfer", "labels": ["backend", "api"]}, {"title": "File Recovery Software Architecture", "body": "### Objective
Design the architecture for the file recovery software.

### Technical Description
The file recovery software will be designed to connect with the data recovery system and retrieve files.

### Tasks
- [ ] Define software layers (presentation, application, data access)
- [ ] Design data models for file recovery
- [ ] Define software components and interactions", "labels": ["architecture", "backend"]}, {"title": "Infrastructure and CI/CD", "body": "### Objective
Configure the infrastructure and CI/CD pipeline for the file recovery software.

### Technical Description
The file recovery software will be deployed on a cloud infrastructure and integrated with a CI/CD pipeline for automated testing and deployment.

### Tasks
- [ ] Set up cloud infrastructure (e.g. AWS, Azure)
- [ ] Configure CI/CD pipeline (e.g. Jenkins, GitLab)
- [ ] Implement automated testing and deployment", "labels": ["infrastructure", "ci/cd"]}]

### Input:
The email archiving software features a data retention system.

### Response:
[{"title": "Email Archiving Software: Data Retention System", "body": "### Objective
Implement a data retention system for the email archiving software.

### Technical Description
The system should allow for the configuration of data retention policies, including retention periods and storage quotas. It should also provide features for searching and retrieving archived emails.

### Tasks
- [ ] Design and implement the data retention system architecture.
- [ ] Develop the data retention policy configuration interface.
- [ ] Implement email archiving and retrieval functionality.
- [ ] Integrate with existing email server infrastructure.
- [ ] Conduct thorough testing of the data retention system.
- [ ] Document the system's architecture and usage guidelines.

", "labels": ["backend", "api"]}]

### Input:
The identity management platform integrates with a single sign-on system.

### Response:
[{"title": "Single Sign-On Integration", "body": "### Objective
Integrate the identity management platform with a single sign-on system.

### Technical Description
The integration will allow users to access the identity management platform without requiring a separate login. The single sign-on system will handle user authentication and provide a seamless experience.

### Tasks
- [ ] Design the API integration with the single sign-on system.
- [ ] Implement the API integration and test the authentication flow.
- [ ] Configure the identity management platform to use the single sign-on system.
- [ ] Test the integration to ensure it meets the requirements.

", "labels": ["backend", "api", "integration"]}]

### Instruction:
Read the software project description and produce structured GitHub issues that represent the core engineering tasks needed to build the system, including architecture, backend, frontend, APIs, infrastructure, testing, and deployment.

### Input:
The expense management software connects with a receipt scanning system.

### Response:
[{"title": "Receipt Scanning Integration", "body": "### Objective
Integrate the expense management software with a receipt scanning system to enable seamless receipt upload and processing.

### Technical Description
The integration will involve developing APIs to communicate with the receipt scanning system, handling data validation and formatting, and implementing business logic to process receipt data.

### Tasks
- [ ] Develop APIs for receipt scanning system integration.
- [ ] Implement data validation and formatting for receipt data.
- [ ] Develop business logic for processing receipt data.
- [ ] Test and deploy integrated solution.
", "labels": ["backend", "api"]}, {"title": "Expense Data Processing", "body": "### Objective
Process expense data received from the receipt scanning system and update the expense management software accordingly.

### Technical Description
The processing will involve implementing business logic to categorize, calculate, and store expense data, as well as handling any errors or exceptions that may occur.

### Tasks
- [ ] Develop business logic for expense data processing.
- [ ] Implement error handling and exception handling for expense data processing.
- [ ] Test and deploy processed expense data solution.
", "labels": ["backend", "data processing"]}, {"title": "Receipt Scanning System API", "body": "### Objective
